message:
refactor(interactive): replace Cx::set_current with explicit Cx passing in spawned tasks

Major refactoring across the interactive agent, command, and RPC modules
to pass the Cx (cancellation context) explicitly to enqueue_pi_event()
instead of relying on thread-local Cx::set_current() in spawned tasks.
This eliminates a class of bugs where the thread-local Cx was stale or
missing in async task contexts:

- interactive/agent.rs: Remove _current = Cx::set_current(Some(task_cx))
  from 5 spawned task closures. Pass task_cx explicitly to
  enqueue_pi_event() calls (~15 sites updated).

- interactive/commands.rs: Same pattern — explicit Cx passing.

- interactive.rs, interactive/ext_session.rs, interactive/keybindings.rs:
  Updated function signatures to accept Cx parameter.

- rpc.rs: RPC layer adjustments for explicit Cx threading (~109 lines).

- extensions.rs, extensions_js.rs: Extension system updates.

- session.rs, session_sqlite.rs: Session layer adjustments.

- package_manager.rs, extension_dispatcher.rs: Minor updates.

- tests/: Update capability_prompt, conformance_regression_gate,
  tui_state tests for new APIs. Refresh test gate reports.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
